# PRD-004: Search

## Problem

Users can't find content older than 30 days.

## Goal

Expose keyword search across archived workspace content.

## Requirements

- PRD-REQ-007: Search documents by title and body text.
- PRD-REQ-008: Filter search results by workspace and date range.
